<?php /* Copyright (c) 2009 hamcrest.org */ class GlobalFunctionFile extends FactoryFile { /** * @var string containing function definitions */ private $functions; public function __construct($file) { parent::__construct($file, ' '); $this->functions = ''; } public function addCall(FactoryCall $call) { $this->functions .= "\n" . $this->generateFactoryCall($call); } public function build() { $this->addFileHeader(); $this->addPart('functions_imports'); $this->addPart('functions_header'); $this->addCode($this->functions); $this->addPart('functions_footer'); } public function generateFactoryCall(FactoryCall $call) { $code = "if (!function_exists('{$call->getName()}')) {\n"; $code.= parent::generateFactoryCall($call); $code.= "}\n"; return $code; } }
